sobre.conteudo: Computer Science student at UNIFEI (6th semester), experienced in backend development, REST APIs and systems integration. I have worked with Python in production and built fullstack applications deployed on AWS. I quickly and autonomously learn new technologies, and I seek to contribute to international teams with proactivity and continuous growth.

grupos.label: AI in Development
itens: OpenCode used thoughtfully as support for development

bullets: Structured backend architecture, REST API, PostgreSQL, AWS
Frontend React + Vite; backend Node.js + Express + Prisma
Developed system integrations via REST APIs in Python, including integration with chatbots and the company's financial systems
Data analysis and processing for automation of internal processes

itens: Continuous learning and rapid adaptation to new technologies and contexts
Proactivity and autonomy in developing solutions and optimizing processes
Systemic and analytical mindset for problem solving
Clear communication and ease collaborating with multidisciplinary teams
Emotional stability combined with seriousness in fulfilling responsibilities
Determination to add more value than expected
